description_long: This bungalow features a modern, single-story design with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is primarily finished in white and light gray, complemented by large windows that allow ample natural light into the living spaces. A small porch area is visible at the front, partially shaded by a roof overhang and flanked by a few trees and landscaped greenery. The rear and side elevations show a simple, functional layout with minimal ornamentation, emphasizing horizontal proportions. The property includes a modest lawn and a paved area, likely serving as a driveway or patio. The overall appearance is contemporary and streamlined, suitable for suburban or urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist white and gray exterior, featuring a small porch and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, and two trees flanking the facade.
description_view_1: Angled top-down view highlighting the flat roof, side lawn, and arrangement of trees around the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back elevation, additional windows, and a clear view of the lawn area.
description_view_3: Side and partial rear view, showing the side windows, lawn, and the paved area adjacent to the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
